hero.alt: Fresh-baked bread on a wooden counter

generated.tagline: A small Roncesvalles bakehouse with a 5 a.m. start
generated.aboutP1: Maple & Crumb is a five-table bakery on Roncesvalles, with a long wooden counter and a stone oven in the back. The day begins at five with the first sourdough out by seven. By ten the case is full, and by mid-afternoon there is not much croissant left to talk about.
generated.aboutP2: The menu changes with the season — pumpkin in October, butter tarts in February — but the country sourdough and the cardamom knot are always there. Saturday mornings are a small line out the door. Come on a Wednesday for a quieter case and a slower coffee.

signatureDishes.name: Country Sourdough
signatureDishes.line: A 36-hour cold-fermented loaf, dark crust, open crumb, baked daily

signatureDishes.name: Cardamom Knot
signatureDishes.line: Laminated dough, cardamom paste, pearl sugar — out of the oven by 9 a.m.

signatureDishes.name: Butter Tart
signatureDishes.line: Flaky pastry, dark corn syrup, sea salt — Ontario as it should be
